get.summary: Get User Info by User ID
get.description: Retrieve the information of the user with the matching user ID.

patch.description: Update the information of an existing user.

email.description: If a new email is given, the user's email verified property will be set to false.

requestBody.description: Post the necessary fields for the API to create a new user.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

example.message: Employee with this email already exists

415.description: Unsupported Media Type - must be multipart/form-data

put.description: Updates an existing employee's details. All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

requestBody.description: Employee details to update (all fields optional)

dateOfJoining.description: Date when employee joined the company

panNumber.description: PAN (Permanent Account Number) for tax purposes

citizenshipFrontPhoto.description: URL or path to citizenship front photo

citizenshipBackPhoto.description: URL or path to citizenship back photo

profilePhoto.description: URL or path to employee profile photo

panPhoto.description: URL or path to PAN card photo

signaturePhoto.description: URL or path to employee signature

internshipDurationMonths.description: Duration of internship in months (applicable for interns only)

internshipEndingReminderSent.description: Flag indicating if internship ending reminder has been sent

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input or validation failed

404.description: Not Found - Employee with given ID does not exist

409.description: Conflict - Email already exists (if updating email)

example.message: Employee with email john.doe@company.com already exists

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Failed to update employee

get.description: Sorted data received based on date of birth

post.description: Creates a new leave request for the authenticated user. Users can request half-day or full-day leaves with optional paid/unpaid status.

durationType.description: Whether the leave is for a half day or full day

endDate.description: End date of the leave (YYYY-MM-DD). Required for full-day leaves

halfDayPeriod.description: Required for half-day leaves - specifies which half of the day

isPaid.description: Whether the leave is paid or unpaid (default: true)

Full Day Paid Leave.summary: Request a full day paid leave

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required fields or validation failed

value.message: Leave type and start date are required
End date is required for full-day leaves
startDate must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
startDate cannot be in the past
You already have a pending or approved leave request for this period

example.message: You do not have permission to create leave requests

id.description: Unique identifier for the given user.

emailVerified.description: Set to true if the user's email has been verified.

createDate.description: The date that the user was created.
